problem id: 6e56c02c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3)

examples:
  11100011 -> 00011111
  00100011 -> 00011001
  00100010 -> 00010001
  00000101 -> 00101000
  01110111 -> 10111011
  11011101 -> 11101110
  11000110 -> 00110110
  01100001 -> 00001011
  10011101 -> 11101100

query: 01101001
predicted answer: 01001011
